mapper.select: SELECT AF.STRIFID, AF.STRIFNM, AF.STRRESNM, AF.MEASURED_DATETIME, AF.FLTBPSIN, AF.FLTBPSOUT, AF.FLTPPSIN, AF.FLTPPSOUT, AF.INSERT_TIME, AF.STRRESNM, AF.STRRESID FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC AF WHERE AF.STRIFID = #{strifid} AND AF.MEASURED_DATETIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{measured_datetime}::DOUBLE PRECISION / 1000);

SELECT AF.STRIFID , AF.STRIFNM , AF.STRRESNM , AF.MEASURED_DATETIME , AF.FLTBPSIN , AF.FLTBPSOUT , AF.FLTPPSIN , AF.FLTPPSOUT , AF.INSERT_TIME , AF.STRRESNM , AF.STRRESID as strresid , coalesce(STRRESNM, (select node_nm from resource.tb_node_mst where node_num = strresid)) as nodeId FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC AF WHERE AF.STRIFID = #{strifid} AND AF.MEASURED_DATETIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{measured_datetime}::DOUBLE PRECISION / 1000);
